Since the user mentioned San Francisco, I need to call get_weather with "San Francisco" as the location. I don't see any other parameters needed, and the function doesn't have any other required fields. So I should generate a tool call with the name get_weather and the arguments as {"location": "San Francisco"}. That should fetch the current weather for them.
